scripts.test: postman collection run collections/toolshop-collection.json -e environments/toolshop-dev.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/report.html
scripts.test:ci: node scripts/inject-credentials.js && postman collection run collections/toolshop-collection.json -e environments/toolshop-ci.json --reporters cli,junit --reporter-junit-export reports/results.xml
